Humans are the only known currently existing [[Modosapients]] and [[Sapient|Sapients]] for that matter.

[[Immanuelle]] and all current [[Evolutionists]] are humans. [[Adam]] was the first human

== See Also ==

* [[transhumanism]]

[[Category:Modosapients]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Humans]][[Category:Humans]]
[[Category:Pages]]
